title: Seeing a Crutch in a Dream: Support
seoDescription: What does it mean to use a crutch in a dream? Spiritual support, friendship, weakness, recovery, and help.
introduction: A crutch is a friend that keeps you standing. Seeing a crutch in a dream symbolizes that you are struggling to stand on your own and **'You Need Support (A Prop)'**. However, this is not bad; it indicates the presence of a force (family/friend) that protects you from falling.
symbolism:
The state of the crutch:

**Throwing the Crutch:** Symbolizes that you have healed, regained your strength, and are no longer dependent on anyone.

**Breaking:** Indicates the collapse of the support you relied on and disappointment.

**Walking with a Crutch:** Signifies perseverance and not giving up despite difficulties.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** At this stage, seeing a crutch indicates that you need a new beginning in your life. Your search for support offers an opportunity for inner transformation; it heralds that you are entering a process of redefining yourself.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** During the Waxing Moon phase, walking with a crutch symbolizes your resilience against difficulties. This may be a sign that the supportive elements in your life are strengthening and providing a driving force for you to feel stronger.

**🌕 Full Moon:** The Full Moon illuminates the meaning of the crutch; it shows that your search for support has concluded and you are standing strong. This phase is a time to find inner peace and confidence, and it is time to celebrate overcoming all challenges that came with support.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** In the Waning Moon phase, throwing away the crutch symbolizes your independence and ability to stand on your own feet. This is a message that it is time to say goodbye to past supports and create a new, stronger self; the time to let go has come.
commonScenarios: Receiving a crutch as a gift: Symbolizes that someone will lend you a hand in your difficult times.
Wooden crutch: Represents support coming from a traditional and elder figure.
Iron crutch: Indicates a strong and unshakeable support.
cta: The crutch dream signifies friendship. Download the Dream Boat app to learn who to lean on.
